description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Source package that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: build and docs. The build job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, installs dependencies, runs unit tests with pytest, creates a source package with poetry, and uploads the artifact. The docs job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.13, installs dependencies, builds Sphinx documentation, and uploads it.
